ksa_text: Evaluate and develop AI workforce structure, resources, and requirements, including competency framework definition, role design, hiring process management, and team composition for technical depth and cross-functional capability balance.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-T-006 (Leadership & Strategy/Task) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.483. Highest framework: NIST AI RMF at 0.483.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, Leadership & Strategy, composite 0.483. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Leadership & Strategy (composite 0.483)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Leadership & Strategy at ~6% market presence. Leadership/strategy above IC scope. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
